name: Grok Build 0.1
tagline: Fast coding model trained specifically for agentic coding; 256K context, priced $1.
metaDescription: Grok Build 0.1 (xAI (Grok)), released 2026-04 — part of the Grok Code line. Fast coding model trained specifically for agentic coding; 256K context, priced $1.…
overview: Grok Build 0.1 is a large language model from xAI (Grok), part of the Grok Code line. Released 2026-04. Coding-specialised models tuned for fast, agentic software development.
What's notable in this version: Fast coding model trained specifically for agentic coding; 256K context, priced $1.00/$2.00 per M tokens in the xAI API.
